{{Infobox character
| name = Naberius Clayborn
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
| name = Naberius Clayborn
| aliases = Lord Clayborn, Witness, Witness Clayborn, Naberius
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Guild Chronicler, keeper of the Imperial Palace treasury, the Chronicler, Chronicler in red, treasurer, the Witness/Witness Clayborn/A Witness/Witness in charge of Imperial finance/The Witness report included Estyr accusing Calder of being enthralled. (Note: The text treats 'Witness' as a title/role)
| abilities = Intent
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Naberius Clayborn Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Naberius Clayborn, also known as [[Lord]] Clayborn or Witness Clayborn, is a prominent figure within the [[Guild of Witnesses]]. He has served as a Chronicler and previously held the position of keeper for the [[Imperial Palace treasury]]. A man of significant wealth and extensive knowledge regarding government operations, he is described as having a striking appearance, often wearing high-quality, eye-catching clothing and possessing long, wavy dark hair. He is frequently accompanied by his [[Silent One]], [[Tristania]], a mute woman who provides his protection. Clayborn's role involves high-stakes missions, such as hiring a [[Navigator]] to retrieve the [[Heart of Nakothi]] from a specific island. During these endeavors, he has demonstrated remarkable skill in evading observation by highly trained stealth experts. His connection to the [[Heart of Nakothi]] is a central point of contention; he has been observed displaying an intense, almost desperate attachment to the relic, leading to accusations that he is enthralled by it. While some believe his intent is to become a [[Soulbound]] and harness the power of [[Nakothi]], others have claimed he died due to his mind being eroded by the object. Despite conflicting reports regarding his death, he remains a figure of immense political importance, with some suggesting he was destined to become the next Emperor.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius Clayborn, a half-heritage [[Guild]] Chronicler and former [[Imperial]] Palace treasurer known as the Witness, traveled with a map and compass while providing navigation for [[Calder]]. During an expedition to find the Heart, he experienced awe toward the object and was briefly protected by [[Tristania]] before shooting her in the back of the head. Although he was a candidate for the throne and predicted to be the next Emperor, Naberius was later taken into custody by the [[Consultants]], only to escape by using his [[Intent]] to break his ropes. He eventually followed a whispered song to an abandoned meadow, where he used his [[Intent]] on the [[Heart of Nakothi]] and was seen dancing with it. Ultimately, Naberius's mind was eroded by the Heart, resulting in his death.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is a [[Guild]] Chronicler and former keeper of the [[Imperial Palace treasury]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is the Chronicler.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius was the Chronicler in charge of financial records in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a Chronicler in red.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is of half-heritage, with a father from [[Erin]] and a mother who was an [[Imperial clerk]] from [[Vandenyas]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a treasurer.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a character who carries pistols.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is referred to as the Witness.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a person who was offered a pistol to kill a crew member for relaxation.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius said it would be okay to spend the night in the bay.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius has dark hair and a blindingly white grin.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a Reader.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius's surname is Clayborn.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a character who possesses a map and a compass.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] relies on Naberius for navigation.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a character who anchored outside the island.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius wishes for Alsa to inspect a candidate.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a character who shows awe toward the heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is referred to as Witness Clayborn.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a character being protected by [[Tristania]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Silent One]] was knocked over Naberius.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a character who appeared desperate and was searching for the Heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius has a wound on his calf wrapped with a white bandage.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius wears a blue suit.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius possesses a [[Dalton Foster original]] pistol.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] shot [[Tristania]] in the back of the head.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] wears a red suit.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a Witness.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is being considered to bond the Heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a Reader and has friends in every [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a person whose presence on the ship is required for departure.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lord]] Clayborn is a person to whom problems with the [[Imperial Guard]] should be taken.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a candidate for the throne.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is predicted to be the next Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lord]] Clayborn is expected to come aboard [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is known as [[The Eternal]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a target for hostage negotiation.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius was gagged and tied to the mast during travel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius has sensed the Heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is a guest onboard [[Calder's ship]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius was tied and gagged during a meeting with [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] are taking [[Naberius Clayborn]] into their custody.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius ran away after the [[Consultants]] were ordered to kneel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius was able to use his [[Intent]] to break ropes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius once held the position of Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius followed the whispered song of the Heart to an abandoned meadow.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius runs through the island clutching a gray-green heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] uses his [[Intent]] on the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is seen laughing and dancing with the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Naberius is being carried by Andel and Foster.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] had an assignment for Naberius.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius Clayborn]]'s mind was eroded by the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The tall Naberius Clayborn hired a [[Navigator]] and crew to sail him and his partner toward [[Nakothi’s island]]. Upon reaching his destination, he worked to cut the [[Heart of Nakothi]] free and cradled the object in his arms. Driven by a covetous desire for the Heart, he sought to bond with it to achieve immortality. Following these events, Naberius was recovered by [[Navigator]] Captain [[Calder]] [[Marten]] while aboard the ship.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A Witness is a type of person that requires a team to kill.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] has hired a [[Navigator]] to sail him and his partner to [[Nakothi’s island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] has a hired [[Navigator]] crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is a tall man.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Naberius is a person who might want to steal the [[Heart of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Naberius is working to cut the Heart free.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Naberius is cradling the Heart in his arms.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is covetous of the Heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is on [[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] can bond with the [[Heart of Nakothi]] for immortality.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] is mentioned in relation to the Heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] was recovered by [[Navigator]] Captain [[Calder]] [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Naberius has wax-sealed memories.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Witness in charge of [[Imperial]] finance is associated with candles.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Naberius is a person who would not have accepted the title of Emperor.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The peace accords were penned by the hand of a Witness.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Witnesses come in pairs consisting of a [[Silent One]] and a Chronicler.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Shera]] failed to kill [[Naberius Clayborn]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Witness report included [[Estyr]] accusing [[Calder]] of being enthralled.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I do not refer to your crew,” the Witness said grimly.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"I’m sorry, Mister Clayborn, but there will be a slight delay before we reach your destination."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"Naberius wishes to have you inspect it yourself."<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“You’ve verified the Heart, then, Witness Clayborn.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Maxeus’ mask turned to the Chronicler. “As I said before, Witness Naberius,<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Guild]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
